You can connect through an automatic export data feed of your products into a designated FTP server where it's converted and pushed through to Trade Me."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Any orders received by Trade Me can then be imported from the FTP location on a regular basis."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you.
